name: SB Badminton Huai Yai
nameThai: เอสบี แบดมินตัน ห้วยใหญ่
addressFull: VW49+PJ2, Huai Yai, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Daily 10:00-23:00 according to ThaiThurkic; Google Maps does not currently publish hours.

courts.notes: A Thai Maps review describes six courts; no current operator facility page was found.

englishEvidence: No English replies, English booking page, foreign-member references or readable English signage were found in the accessible evidence.
facilities: six indoor courts reported by a reviewer
wheelchair-accessible parking reported by a directory

audience.whoShouldSkip: Visitors who require published prices, equipment rental or confirmed English support should arrange those details in advance.

praise: A recent Thai review describes good courts and clean bathrooms.
An older Thai review identifies six courts and says the layout works well for competitions.

comparison.differentiator: A dedicated Huai Yai neighbourhood court that fills a geographic gap south-east of central Pattaya.

sources.label: Official Facebook identity linked by the business directory
sources.accessNote: Identity URL resolved through ThaiThurkic; the Facebook page itself was not directly inspectable.
